block_00: Stock and crypto news of the week inside
block_03: Everyone has been watching the news about Twitter Inc. for almost a month. This week has finally brought us some clarity – Elon Musk secured a deal on April 25, agreeing to buy the social network for $54.20 a share, which is valuing the firm at roughly $44 billion.
block_07: Shares of Facebook parent Meta soared in early trading Thursday on the back of its Q1 earnings report – the stock price rose by 8% this week.
block_10: Q1 was not successful for some companies – after the Earnings Report was released, the shares price fell by 19%.
